languages.text: "Печальные события, приведшие к новому начинанию. Да будет благословлен Богом-Машиной твой путь Познания, что лежит сквозь тернии энтропии".
"A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."
languages.original_text: "Печальные события, приведшие к новому начинанию. Да будет благословлен Богом-Машиной твой путь Познания, что лежит сквозь тернии энтропии".

traits.locale_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."
"A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."
"A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."
"A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

languages.text: «Un giro trágico de acontecimientos que conduce a un nuevo comienzo. Que el Dios Máquina bendiga su camino al conocimiento, que atraviesa las espinas de la entropía».
languages.original_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: «Un giro trágico de acontecimientos que conduce a un nuevo comienzo. Que el Dios Máquina bendiga su camino al conocimiento, que atraviesa las espinas de la entropía».

languages.text: “一场悲剧性的变故，却开启了新的篇章。愿这条遍布熵之荆棘的求知之路得受万机之神的赐福。”
languages.original_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: “一场悲剧性的变故，却开启了新的篇章。愿这条遍布熵之荆棘的求知之路得受万机之神的赐福。”

languages.text: "Eine tragische Wendung der Dinge führt zu einem Neuanfang. Möge Euer Weg des Wissens, der Euch durch die Dornen der Entropie führt, vom Maschinengott gesegnet sein."
languages.original_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: "Eine tragische Wendung der Dinge führt zu einem Neuanfang. Möge Euer Weg des Wissens, der Euch durch die Dornen der Entropie führt, vom Maschinengott gesegnet sein."

languages.text: « Un tragique concours de circonstances pavant la voie d'un nouveau commencement. Puisse le Dieu-Machine bénir votre cheminement vers la connaissance à travers les ronces de l'entropie. »
languages.original_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: « Un tragique concours de circonstances pavant la voie d'un nouveau commencement. Puisse le Dieu-Machine bénir votre cheminement vers la connaissance à travers les ronces de l'entropie. »

languages.text: "Yeni bir başlangıca yol açan trajik bir olaylar silsilesi. Entropi dikenlerinin arasından geçen İrfan yolu, Makine Tanrı tarafından kutsansın."
languages.original_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: "Yeni bir başlangıca yol açan trajik bir olaylar silsilesi. Entropi dikenlerinin arasından geçen İrfan yolu, Makine Tanrı tarafından kutsansın."

languages.text: 「悲劇的な出来事が新たな始まりへと導く。エントロピーの棘を通り抜ける知識の道が、機械神によって祝福されることを。」
languages.original_text: "A tragic turn of events leading to a new beginning. May your path of Knowledge, which lies through the thorns of entropy, be blessed by the Machine God."

traits.locale_text: 「悲劇的な出来事が新たな始まりへと導く。エントロピーの棘を通り抜ける知識の道が、機械神によって祝福されることを。」
